dialogue_texts: Reimu
What is with all this mail that has scattered all over the place?
Reimu
Is this supposed to be notices containing his rumor?
Argh... No... Confound it! Where have they all gone?
Reimu
Could that be the one?
Reimu
Oof! Geez! Where did that come from?
Oh! Sorry, Your Honor. Very sorry. I didn't notice you were standing in my way!
Reimu
That's fine, but please explain what's with all this mail on the ground.
I was trying to gather all of the mail I need to deliver and I wasn't watching where I was going.
Reimu
You can't leave all of the mail on the ground; you have got to pick them all up!
What now, Your Honor? I also didn't take the chance to introduce myself.
Kotori
The name's Kotori Tegami - a tengu who delivers the mail to Kozankyo's residents.
Reimu
So, you're one of the primary mail couriers in the city, eh?
Kotori
That's right. I'm normally a perfect postgirl, but I'm having trouble trying to get all the mail back in my pouch.
Reimu
I'd like to help, but there's this rumor from the Gensokyo Socialite Order I have to uncover.
Kotori
Rumor? Wouldn't you know it - I don't want to get persecuted by the Order...
Reimu
If we happen to stumble across a grunt around here, there will be no chance for escape!
Kotori
I would have to halt my job in that case...
Kotori
I'll be searching thoroughly for a while...
Reimu
Please do it yourself. I can't help you at this moment.
Kotori
I can't, I have a crucial deadline approaching.
Reimu
I don't want to pick a fight with you...
Kotori
Time is money... you'll see me fired without it!
